'''Nikaede Celso''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] who was the companion of [[Drake Paulsen]]. She was 2.4 meters tall, which was large for her species. She was also very clever and a talented [[Technician/Legends|technician]]. She was patient and diligent, but did have a tendency to whine during a crisis.

Nikaede was born of a noble family on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] and smuggled from the planet through a selfless sacrifice by her parents. She had no idea what happened to her friends and family, and as a result usually bonded with down-on-their-luck people that she met.
